name: bawonsak-portfolio
comment:overrides: REQUIRED — do not remove. Pins Vite to Astro 6's v7 line. @tailwindcss/vite's peer allows Vite 8 (the current `latest`), so without this npm installs a second, rolldown-based Vite 8 next to Astro's Vite 7 and the build fails with 'Missing field tsconfigPaths on BindingViteResolvePluginConfig'. A clean reinstall does NOT fix it. Drop only once Astro and @tailwindcss/vite agree on one Vite major.
